blocks.text: Wærenskjold on the classics podium — and a monster week ahead
🚴 Dwars door Vlaanderen — Van Aert denied at the line, Wærenskjold på podiet! 11:55
Barcelona lead La Liga by 4 points. A win at the Metropolitano on Saturday could end the title race early. Carlsen, clay, CS2, and a Bernabéu European night all follow.

blocks.label: 🗓️ Also this week
items: ♟️ Thu 18:45 — Carlsen opens Grenke Chess Freestyle Round 1
🎾 Sun 06:00 — Monte-Carlo Masters begins — clay season opener
🎮 Mon 02:00 — PGL CS2 Major Bucharest (rain enters the arena)
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid (CL QF)
